description: Create a Paired-Associate Learning experiment in PsychoPy Builder saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/paired_associates/paired_associates.psyexp using a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/paired_associates/conditions.csv. The conditions file must contain the pairs: BEES/HIVE, LION/ROAR, SOUP/BOWL, KING/QUEEN, and TABLE/CHAIR. The experiment must feature a study routine (2-second cue/target display), a test routine with an editable text box for participant input, and a feedback routine. The feedback logic must perform a case-insensitive comparison (ignoring extra spaces) between the input and the target, displaying "Correct!" in green or "Incorrect" in red. Verify the experiment's functionality by completing at least one trial.
